g.text: Two WAN uplinks, a zone-based UniFi firewall, and a 4-node Proxmox cluster
Ahsoka Gateway: UniFi zone-based firewall, 14 networks across 12 zones
Galaxy Proxmox cluster: management on MGMT-A (VLAN 70), Corosync on Cluster-Net (VLAN 71)
Household VLANs (Trusted, IoT, DMZ) omitted; the full inventory lives in Infrastructure/Network/UniFi.
